arts.ttl: Tonight's Swansea City news as trio of names thrown into Swans job mix
arts.sum: Former Wales striker-turned-BBC-pundit Iwan Roberts has pushed forward the names of Alan Tate, Rob Edwards and Liam Rosenior for the vacant Swansea job. "Maybe someone like Alan Tate, who has been by Steve Cooper's side for five or six years now and has seen success at Swansea, getting to the play-offs, and getting Forest back into the Premier League .
